title: Wullie's Console remake
description: a mod pack that aims to recreate the console feel with some minor modern improvements
body:
a pack that aims to recreate the console feel with some small modern improvements

---
### this pack is based on the [re-console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) pack
---

the goal of this pack is to increase preformance and add some modern features whilst combining the console feel 

note: this pack is mainly made for me and my friends

## included
- craftable notch apples
- old ore drops
- simple voice chat 
- legacy4j
